name: dart-references
description: Displays the number of references for Dart and Flutter in VSCode

dartFunctionReferences.enable.description: Enable or disable the display of function reference counts in Dart files.

dartReferences.referencesLabel.description: Label for the number of references displayed next to Dart functions, classes, methods, constructors, variables, and enums.

dartReferences.zeroReferencesLabel.description: Label displayed when there are no references found for a Dart functions, classes, methods, constructors, variables, and enums.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
